use std::fs;
use std::path::PathBuf;

fn setup_workdir() -> PathBuf {
    let dir = PathBuf::from("/tmp/myapp_workdir");
    fs::create_dir_all(&dir).unwrap();
    dir
}

fn cleanup_workdir(dir: &PathBuf) {
    let _ = fs::remove_dir_all(dir);
}

fn run_job() {
    let workdir = setup_workdir();
    do_work(&workdir);
    cleanup_workdir(&workdir);
}

fn do_work(_dir: &PathBuf) {}
